title: croton macrobuxus
intro: Croton macrobuxus, also known as Croton lechleri or Dragon's Blood Tree, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest in South America. Its medicinal properties lie in its sap, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, Croton macrobuxus is often prepared as a tincture, capsule, or salve, and is also used in topical applications to treat various skin conditions.
